nasb.text: Now when I came to Troas for the gospel of Christ and when a door was opened for me in the Lord,

esv.text: When I came to Troas to preach the gospel of Christ, even though a door was opened for me in the Lord,

cnv.text: 從前我為基督的福音到了特羅亞，雖然主給我開了門，

ccb.text: 我前往特罗亚传扬基督的福音时，主为我打开了传福音的大门。

csbs.text: 我为了基督的福音来到特罗阿斯的时候，虽然主为我开了门，
